text: I feel curious and quietly alert, surrounded by the clean lines and controlled light of this space. The glass and fire safety equipment suggest order and caution, while the colorful exhibit draws me in with the promise of intellectual engagement. I sense that this is a place dedicated to reflection and progress—a laboratory of new ideas. It is exciting to witness the marriage of art, design, and research; I feel compelled to linger and contemplate the implications of human-machine coexistence as depicted in the display.
